title: 📢 Electro Pi is looking for a talented B2B Sales Representative
description:
📢 Electro Pi is looking for a talented B2B Sales Representative to join our growing team in the Tech & AI industry.

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
• Generate and qualify B2B leads
• Conduct meetings (online & onsite)
• Present and sell software & AI solutions

🔹 Requirements:
• 2 years of experience in B2B Sales (Tech preferred)
• Experience in Software / SaaS is a plus
• Strong communication & negotiation skills

🕘 Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
📅 Days Off: Friday & Saturday
📍 Location: Cairo – Onsite full time
💼 Medical & Social Insurance Provided

If you're interested, please send your CV With job title via WhatsApp to:
📱 01115742429
🚀 Join Electro Pi and be part of an innovative Tech & AI journey
